challenge.title: FizzBuzz Single
challenge.description: Given a number N, print Fizz, Buzz, FizzBuzz, or the number.

challenge.title: Reverse a String

tournaments.name: ByteBattle Grand Opening
tournaments.description: The first official tournament of the rebranded ByteBattle arena!

challenges.title: Sum of Array
challenges.description: Given an array of integers, return their sum.

challenges.title: Maximum Element
challenges.description: Find the maximum element in an array of integers.

challenges.title: Minimum Element
challenges.description: Find the minimum element in an array of integers.

challenges.title: Array Product
challenges.description: Given a JSON array of integers, print their product.

challenges.title: Reverse Array
challenges.description: Given a JSON array of integers, print it reversed as a JSON array.

challenges.title: Sort Array
challenges.description: Given a JSON array of integers, print it sorted in ascending order.

challenges.title: Unique Elements
challenges.description: Given a JSON array, print only unique elements preserving order.
challenges.outputFormat: Print unique elements as JSON array

challenges.title: Flatten Array
challenges.description: Given a nested JSON array (max 2 levels), flatten it.
challenges.inputFormat: A nested JSON array via stdin

challenges.title: Move Zeros
challenges.description: Move all zeros in an array to the end while keeping the order of other elements. Print as JSON array.
challenges.outputFormat: Print the result as JSON array

challenges.title: Rotate Array
challenges.description: Rotate an array to the right by K steps. Input: JSON array on first line, K on second line. Print as JSON array.
challenges.inputFormat: First line: JSON array. Second line: K
challenges.outputFormat: Print the rotated array as JSON

challenges.title: Second Largest
challenges.description: Find the second largest element in a JSON array of distinct integers.

challenges.title: Merge Sorted Arrays
challenges.description: Merge two sorted arrays into one sorted array. Input: two JSON arrays on separate lines.
challenges.inputFormat: Two sorted JSON arrays, one per line
challenges.outputFormat: Print the merged sorted array as JSON

challenges.title: Two Sum (Sorted)
challenges.description: Given a sorted array and target (on next line), find two numbers that add up to target. Print their 1-based indices space-separated.
challenges.inputFormat: First line: sorted JSON array. Second line: target

challenges.title: Reverse Vowels
challenges.description: Reverse only the vowels in a string (case-insensitive, preserve case).
challenges.outputFormat: Print the string with vowels reversed

challenges.title: Container With Most Water
challenges.description: Given an array of heights, find two lines that together with x-axis form a container holding the most water. Print the max area.
challenges.inputFormat: A JSON array of heights via stdin

challenges.title: Almost Palindrome
challenges.description: Given a string, determine if it can become a palindrome by removing at most one character. Print "true" or "false".

challenges.title: Max Sum Subarray of Size K
challenges.description: Given an array and K (on next line), find the maximum sum of any contiguous subarray of size K.
challenges.inputFormat: First line: JSON array. Second line: K

challenges.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating
challenges.description: Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
challenges.outputFormat: Print the length of longest unique substring

challenges.title: Min Size Subarray Sum
challenges.description: Given a positive integer array and target (on next line), find the minimal length subarray whose sum >= target. Print 0 if no such subarray.
challenges.inputFormat: First line: positive integer JSON array. Second line: target
challenges.outputFormat: Print the minimal subarray length (0 if impossible)

challenges.title: Max Consecutive Ones
challenges.description: Given a binary array (only 0s and 1s), find the maximum number of consecutive 1s.
challenges.inputFormat: A JSON binary array via stdin
challenges.outputFormat: Print the max consecutive ones count

challenges.title: Balanced Brackets
challenges.description: Given a string of brackets ()[]{}​, determine if they are balanced. Print "true" or "false".
challenges.inputFormat: A string of brackets via stdin

challenges.title: Next Greater Element
challenges.description: For each element in a JSON array, find the next element that is greater. Use -1 if none. Print as JSON array.
challenges.outputFormat: Print next greater elements as JSON array

challenges.title: Evaluate RPN
challenges.description: Evaluate a Reverse Polish Notation expression. Input is space-separated tokens with operators +, -, *, /. Division truncates toward zero.

challenges.title: Asteroid Collision
challenges.description: Given a JSON array of integers representing asteroids moving in a row. Positive = right, negative = left. When two collide, smaller one explodes. Equal = both explode. Print surviving asteroids as JSON array.
challenges.inputFormat: A JSON array of integers via stdin
challenges.outputFormat: Print surviving asteroids as JSON array

challenges.title: Binary Search
challenges.description: Given a sorted JSON array and target (on next line), return the index of target. Print -1 if not found.
challenges.inputFormat: First line: sorted JSON array. Second line: target

challenges.title: Integer Square Root
challenges.description: Given a non-negative integer N, compute the integer part of its square root (floor).

challenges.title: Find Peak Element
challenges.description: Given a JSON array where no two adjacent elements are equal, find any peak element (greater than neighbors). Print its index.
challenges.outputFormat: Print the index of a peak element

challenges.title: First and Last Position
challenges.description: Given a sorted array and target (on next line), find the first and last position of target. Print as "first last". Print "-1 -1" if not found.
challenges.inputFormat: First line: sorted JSON array. Second line: target
challenges.outputFormat: Print first and last index space-separated

challenges.title: Number of Islands
challenges.description: Given a 2D grid of "1"s (land) and "0"s (water) as a JSON 2D array of strings, count the number of islands. An island is surrounded by water and formed by connecting adjacent lands horizontally or vertically.
challenges.inputFormat: A 2D JSON array of "0" and "1" strings

challenges.title: Flood Fill
challenges.description: Given a 2D grid (JSON), a start row, start col, and new color (space-separated on second line), flood-fill from (row,col). Print the modified grid as JSON.
challenges.inputFormat: First line: 2D JSON array. Second line: row col newColor
challenges.outputFormat: Print the modified grid as JSON

challenges.title: Max Area of Island
challenges.description: Given a 2D binary grid (JSON array of 0s and 1s), find the maximum area of an island. An island is a group of 1s connected 4-directionally.

challenges.title: Climbing Stairs
challenges.description: You can climb 1 or 2 steps at a time. Given N stairs, how many distinct ways can you climb to the top?
challenges.outputFormat: Print the number of distinct ways

challenges.title: House Robber
challenges.description: Given a JSON array representing money in each house, find the maximum amount you can rob without robbing two adjacent houses.
challenges.inputFormat: A JSON array of integers via stdin

challenges.title: Coin Change
challenges.description: Given coin denominations (JSON array, first line) and an amount (second line), find the fewest number of coins to make that amount. Print -1 if impossible.
challenges.inputFormat: First line: JSON array of coin denominations. Second line: target amount
challenges.outputFormat: Print the minimum number of coins or -1

challenges.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
challenges.description: Given a JSON array of integers, find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.
challenges.inputFormat: A JSON array of integers via stdin

challenges.title: Maximum Subarray (Kadane)
challenges.description: Given a JSON array of integers, find the contiguous subarray with the largest sum. Print that sum.
challenges.inputFormat: A JSON array of integers via stdin

challenges.title: Reverse a String

challenges.description: Check if a string is a palindrome. Print "true" or "false".

challenges.title: Remove Duplicates
challenges.description: Remove duplicate characters, keeping first occurrence.
challenges.outputFormat: Print the string with duplicates removed

challenges.description: Shift each letter by N positions forward (wrap z→a). First line: string, second line: N. Only shift a-z and A-Z.

challenges.inputFormat: A JSON array of strings via stdin

challenges.description: Check if two strings (on separate lines) are anagrams (case-insensitive). Print "true" or "false".

challenges.description: Given N: print "Fizz" if divisible by 3, "Buzz" if by 5, "FizzBuzz" if both, else N.
challenges.outputFormat: Print Fizz, Buzz, FizzBuzz, or the number

challenges.description: Print "even" or "odd" for the given number.

challenges.title: Factorial
challenges.description: Given N, print N!.

challenges.title: Nth Fibonacci
challenges.description: Print the Nth Fibonacci number (0-indexed). F(0)=0, F(1)=1.

challenges.title: Is Prime
challenges.description: Print "true" if the number is prime, "false" otherwise.

challenges.title: GCD

challenges.title: Sum of Digits
challenges.description: Print the sum of digits of a non-negative integer.

challenges.title: Decimal to Binary
challenges.description: Print the binary representation of a non-negative integer.

challenges.description: Count steps to reach 1 via Collatz sequence. Even: divide by 2. Odd: 3n+1.

challenges.title: Prime Factors
challenges.description: Print prime factorization as space-separated factors in ascending order.

challenges.title: Roman to Integer

challenges.inputFormat: A Roman numeral string via stdin

challenges.title: Two Sum (Unsorted)
challenges.description: Given an array of integers and a target (on next line), find two numbers that add up to the target. Print their 0-based indices space-separated (smaller index first).
challenges.inputFormat: First line: JSON array. Second line: target

challenges.title: First Unique Character
challenges.description: Given a string, find the index of the first non-repeating character. Print -1 if none exists.

challenges.title: Group Anagrams
challenges.description: Given a JSON array of strings, group anagrams together. Print each group sorted alphabetically, groups sorted by first element. Output as JSON array of arrays.
challenges.inputFormat: A JSON array of strings via stdin
challenges.outputFormat: Print grouped anagrams as JSON array of arrays

challenges.title: Contains Duplicate
challenges.description: Given a JSON array of integers, print "true" if any value appears at least twice, "false" if every element is distinct.

challenges.title: Power of Two
challenges.description: Given a positive integer, print "true" if it is a power of two, "false" otherwise.

challenges.title: Count Digits
challenges.description: Count the number of digits in a non-negative integer.

challenges.title: Zigzag Array
challenges.description: Rearrange a JSON array so that a[0] < a[1] > a[2] < a[3] > a[4]... Print the result as JSON array.

challenges.title: Best Time to Buy Stock
challenges.description: Given a JSON array of stock prices, find the maximum profit from one buy and one sell. Print 0 if no profit is possible.
challenges.inputFormat: A JSON array of prices via stdin

challenges.title: Single Number
challenges.description: Given a JSON array where every element appears twice except one, find the single one.

challenges.title: Number of 1 Bits
challenges.description: Given a non-negative integer, print the number of 1 bits in its binary representation.

challenges.title: String Compression
challenges.description: Compress a string using counts of repeated characters. Return original if compressed is not shorter. e.g. "aabcccccaaa" → "a2b1c5a3".
challenges.outputFormat: Print the compressed string or original if not shorter

challenges.title: Generate Parentheses
challenges.description: Given N, generate all valid combinations of N pairs of parentheses. Print as JSON array sorted lexicographically.
challenges.outputFormat: Print all valid parentheses as JSON array

challenges.title: Unique Paths
challenges.description: A robot starts at top-left of an m×n grid and can only move right or down. How many unique paths to bottom-right? Input: m n (space-separated).
challenges.inputFormat: Two space-separated integers m and n
challenges.outputFormat: Print the number of unique paths

challenges.title: Minimum Path Sum
challenges.description: Given a 2D grid (JSON) of non-negative integers, find a path from top-left to bottom-right that minimizes the sum. You can only move right or down.
challenges.inputFormat: A 2D JSON array of non-negative integers

challenges.title: Shortest Path in Grid
challenges.description: Given a 2D binary grid (JSON), find the shortest path from top-left (0,0) to bottom-right using BFS. 0 = passable, 1 = blocked. Print -1 if no path. Count includes start and end cells.
challenges.outputFormat: Print the shortest path length or -1
